rules.rule_text:
rule backoff
{
	meta:
		author = "Brian Wallace @botnet_hunter"
		author_email = "bwall@ballastsecurity.net"
		date = "2014-08-21"
		description = "Identify Backoff"

	strings:
		$s1 = "&op=%d&id=%s&ui=%s&wv=%d&gr=%s&bv=%s"
		$s2 = "%s @ %s"
		$s3 = "Upload KeyLogs"

	condition:
		all of them
}
